status.comment: Verified 2026-06-27 (status was stale — aim predates the watchdog reflection work). Reflection pattern is substantially built: on compact the watchdog records patterns/lessonsLearned/systemLimitations into session-memory.ts, summarizeRecentFriction() feeds prior friction back into the next session's context, and the aim graph has an addReflection MCP tool. Remaining open-ended part: turning reflections into measurable self-improvement (closes into 4e3d89bf auto-propose).
